title: Nether Portal Coordinate Scale
description: Make default coordinates scale for Overworld and Nether via portals 1 to 1 and allows to override the scale in config file
body:
✨ What it does

Tired of doing mental math every time you hop between the Overworld and the Nether? The mod sets the default coordinate scale to 1 block = 1 block in both dimensions, so a portal at (1000, 100, 1000) in the Overworld lines up with (1000, 100, 1000) in the Nether—no more 8× conversions.

⚙️ Fully configurable

A simple config file (auto-generated on first launch) lets you override the scale

🤝 Compatibility
- Works with any world type, custom portals, and most dimension-adding mods.
- Plays nicely with data-pack or modded portal helpers.
